columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalEmail
columns.description: The email address of the authenticated principal making the request.

columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalSubject
columns.description: The unique subject identifier for the principal (useful for federated identities).

columns.name: AuthenticationInfoServiceAccountKeyName
columns.description: The resource name of the service account key used to authenticate the request.

columns.name: AuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Details on the authorization checks performed, including the permissions evaluated.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: GCPResourceName
columns.description: The name of the resource that the operation is acting on.

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: The type of resource involved in the operation (e.g., project, folder, organization).

columns.name: InsertID
columns.description: A unique ID for the log entry used for deduplication.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The full resource name of the log (e.g., projects/[PROJECT_ID]/logs/[LOG_ID]).

columns.name: MetadataParentDeltaDestinationParentId
columns.description: The destination parent ID when a resource moves between parents (e.g., folder or org).

columns.name: MetadataParentDeltaDestinationParentType
columns.description: The type of destination parent (e.g., folder, organization).

columns.name: MetadataParentDeltaSourceParentId
columns.description: The original parent ID of the resource before the move.

columns.name: MetadataParentDeltaSourceParentType
columns.description: The type of source parent (e.g., folder, organization).

columns.name: MetadataType
columns.description: The type of metadata associated with the log entry.

columns.name: MethodName
columns.description: The API method that was called (e.g., google.cloud.resourcemanager.v3.Projects.CreateProject).

columns.name: NumResponseItems
columns.description: The number of items returned in the response, if applicable.

columns.name: OperationFirst
columns.description: Indicates whether this is the first log entry for a long-running operation.

columns.name: OperationID
columns.description: An identifier for a long-running operation shared across related log entries.

columns.name: OperationLast
columns.description: Indicates whether this is the last log entry for a long-running operation.

columns.name: OperationProducer
columns.description: The name of the producer of the operation (e.g., the GCP service executing the operation).

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: The type of the log payload (e.g., protoPayload, textPayload).

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: The time the log entry was received by Cloud Logging.

columns.name: RequestConstraint
columns.description: The Org Policy constraint specified in the request.

columns.name: RequestCreateTime
columns.description: The timestamp when the resource was created as specified in the request.

columns.name: RequestCustomConstraint
columns.description: Custom constraint configuration specified in the request.

columns.name: RequestDestinationParent
columns.description: The resource name of the destination parent, used in resource moves.

columns.name: RequestFolderDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the folder provided in the request.

columns.name: RequestFolderParent
columns.description: The parent resource of the folder specified in the request.

columns.name: RequestLifecycleState
columns.description: The lifecycle state of the resource in the request (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETE_REQUESTED).

columns.name: RequestListValue
columns.description: A list of values specified in the request (e.g., tags, constraints).

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerIP
columns.description: The IP address of the caller who made the request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerSuppliedUserAgent
columns.description: The user agent String provided by the caller's client application.

columns.name: RequestMetadataDestinationAttributes
columns.description: Metadata about the request destination, such as port or protocol.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesAuth
columns.description: Authentication attributes related to the request, such as authority selector or principal email.

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesReason
columns.description: The reason or justification for making the request (if provided).

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesTime
columns.description: The timestamp when the request was made.

columns.name: RequestName
columns.description: The name or ID of the resource targeted by the request.

columns.name: RequestOptionsRequestedPolicyVersion
columns.description: The version of the IAM policy format requested.

columns.name: RequestPageSize
columns.description: The number of results to return per page in a list request.

columns.name: RequestParent
columns.description: The parent resource (e.g., folder or org) under which the request is being made.

columns.name: RequestPolicyAuditConfigs
columns.description: The audit configuration settings defined in the policy request.

columns.name: RequestPolicyBindings
columns.description: A list of role bindings defined in the IAM policy request.

columns.name: RequestPolicyEtag
columns.description: The ETag used for concurrency control in the policy request.

columns.name: RequestPolicyName
columns.description: The resource name of the policy being modified in the request.

columns.name: RequestPolicySpec
columns.description: Detailed specification of the Org Policy being applied.

columns.name: RequestProjectCreateTime
columns.description: The time the project was created as per the request.

columns.name: RequestProjectId
columns.description: The project ID associated with the request.

columns.name: RequestProjectLabels
columns.description: Key-value labels assigned to the project in the request.

columns.name: RequestProjectLifecycleState
columns.description: The lifecycle state of the project (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETE_REQUESTED).

columns.name: RequestProjectName
columns.description: The display name of the project specified in the request.

columns.name: RequestProjectParent
columns.description: The parent resource (folder or organization) under which the project is created.

columns.name: RequestProjectProjectId
columns.description: The unique project ID provided in the request.

columns.name: RequestProjectProjectNumber
columns.description: The numerical project identifier.

columns.name: RequestQuery
columns.description: A query String used for filtering results (e.g., in search or list operations).

columns.name: RequestResource
columns.description: The full representation of the resource included in the request.

columns.name: RequestTagBindingParent
columns.description: The full name of the resource to which the tag is being bound.

columns.name: RequestTagBindingTagValue
columns.description: The tag value being bound to a resource in the request.

columns.name: RequestTagKeyName
columns.description: The full resource name of the tag key referenced in the request.

columns.name: RequestTagValueName
columns.description: The full resource name of the tag value in the request.

columns.name: RequestType
columns.description: The type of request being made (e.g., Create, Update, Delete).

columns.name: RequestUpdateMask
columns.description: A comma-separated list specifying the fields to be updated in a partial update request.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsFolderId
columns.description: The folder ID associated with the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsMethod
columns.description: The method name label used for filtering in logs.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsOrganizationId
columns.description: The organization ID associated with the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsProjectId
columns.description: The project ID associated with the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsService
columns.description: The service name label used for filtering in logs.

columns.name: ResponseAuditConfigs
columns.description: The audit configurations returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseBindings
columns.description: The IAM role bindings included in the response.

columns.name: ResponseCreateTime
columns.description: The timestamp when the resource was created, as returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseDescription
columns.description: A description of the resource or result returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseDisplayName
columns.description: The display name of the resource returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseEtag
columns.description: The ETag used for concurrency control in the response.

columns.name: ResponseLabels
columns.description: The key-value labels attached to the resource in the response.

columns.name: ResponseLifecycleState
columns.description: The lifecycle state of the resource in the response (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETE_REQUESTED).

columns.name: ResponseName
columns.description: The full resource name returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseNamespacedName
columns.description: A namespaced identifier for the resource (used in tagging).

columns.name: ResponseParent
columns.description: The parent resource name associated with the response.

columns.name: ResponsePolicySpec
columns.description: The policy specification returned in the response (Org Policy or IAM policy).

columns.name: ResponseProjectId
columns.description: The project ID returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseProjectNumber
columns.description: The project ID returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseShortName
columns.description: The short, user-defined name of the resource returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseState
columns.description: The current state of the resource (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETED).

columns.name: ResponseTagKey
columns.description: The tag key associated with the resource returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseTagValue
columns.description: The tag value associated with the resource in the response.

columns.name: ResponseTagValueNamespacedName
columns.description: A fully qualified name (including tag key) for the tag value.

columns.name: ResponseType
columns.description: The type of the response payload.

columns.name: ResponseUpdateTime
columns.description: The time when the resource was last updated, as per the response.

columns.name: ServiceDataPolicyDeltaBindingDeltas
columns.description: Changes (additions or removals) to IAM bindings as part of the policy delta.

columns.name: ServiceDataType
columns.description: The type of service-specific data returned in the response.

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: The name of the GCP service handling the request (e.g., cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com).

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Log level indicating the severity of the event (e.g., INFO, ERROR).

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: Status
columns.description: The status of the request, including error codes and messages if the operation failed.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time the log entry was received by logging.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The time the event described by the log entry occurred.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table
